title: Cuneiform Tablet #0500: Neo-Babylonian Administrative
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Administrative document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records administrative matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
